name: Full System Persistence & Async Audit
description: Audit all backend services and celery tasks for persistence and async issues found during recent crashes.

context.goal: Ensure 100% compliance with new commit and async rules across all modules.

steps: Check all services in backend/app/api/v1/ for missing .commit() calls.
Verify all model-to-schema conversions in services have loaded relationships.
Audit all files in backend/app/tasks/ for get_event_loop() usage.
Perform manual E2E check: create product, category, blog post, and static page via Admin UI.
